title: Jujutsu Craft Index Fix
description: This Mod was made to fix the Index out of  Bound Multiplayer bug
body:
Jujutsu Craft Index Fix

(Every Server is allowed to use this mod!)



Jujutsu Craft Index Fix is a server side Forge mod created specifically for the Jujutsu Limitless RPG Minecraft server (https://discord.gg/Mr8YnQbHCK). It fixes a known networking issue where clients running the JujutsuCraft mod send an invalid difficulty packet during login, which can cause players to be disconnected.

This mod fixes the annoying bug where you need RNG to be able to connect to your server when other players are online and playing
